title: Weddings
description: Make your wedding unforgettable. Video guest books, custom props, memory albums, and heirloom keepsakes — for the day that becomes a story you tell forever.

title: Graduations
description: You did it. Now celebrate the way you earned. Custom standees, photo props, and keepsake boxes — for the graduate, the family, the moment.

title: Birthdays
description: From sweet 16 to 50 & fabulous, the birthday is yours. Custom props built around you, your age, your vibe.

title: Quinceañeras
description: The day she becomes a woman deserves a memory chest. Custom keepsakes for la quinceañera — the tiara, the rosary, the vows, and everything in between.

title: Baby Showers
description: Welcome the new generation. Video messages from family, custom photo props, and the first keepsake for the first day.

title: Retirements
description: Honor the years, the work, the legacy. Voice magnets to capture their stories. Memory books for the team. A celebration that lasts.

title: Family Reunions
description: The family that gathers together, stays together. Voice magnets, video displays, and keepsake boxes to mark the year and the names.

title: Kwanzaa
description: The seven principles, the seven days, one celebration. Heirloom keepsakes, video messages, and memory boxes for the kinara.
